name: Process Killer
description: Find and kill processes by name, PID, or pattern. Supports force kill, process tree kill, and batch operations.

inputs.label: Process Name or PID
inputs.help: Process name (partial match, e.g. 'node') or exact PID (e.g. '12345')

inputs.label: Kill immediately (uncheck to list only)
inputs.help: ⚠️ Uncheck to only find/list processes. Check to kill them.

inputs.label: Force Kill (no confirmation)
inputs.help: Skip confirmation. Only effective when Kill is enabled.

inputs.label: Kill Process Tree (children too)
inputs.help: Also kill all child processes. Only effective when Kill is enabled.
